# Wuci-Ji v2 — Aperture Bastion

Site: https://nosuchmachine.net/
Repository: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji
Official emblem: https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/wuci-ji-official-emblem.jpg
Official emblem SHA-256: 716a6a2f845ef9f5c8ae1493474db1ec653fdb09a478089fd144b09c4fd04de9
Machine status: https://nosuchmachine.net/aperture-status.json
Daylight status: https://nosuchmachine.net/daylight-status.json
Daylight v20 Aperture Singularity status: https://nosuchmachine.net/daylight-v20-aperture-singularity-status.json
AI scoring integrity audit: https://nosuchmachine.net/ai-scoring-integrity.html
Daylight / Grok scoring audit: https://nosuchmachine.net/daylight-grok-audit.html
Daylight v20 repo-owned score surface: https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/daylight-v20-gate-repo-owned-ceiling-score-surface-999801305.webp
Daylight v20 public challenge poster: https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/daylight-v20-public-challenge-780thc.jpg
Research metadata: https://nosuchmachine.net/codemeta.json
Citation metadata: https://nosuchmachine.net/citation.cff
Hosted TLS requirements: https://nosuchmachine.net/hosting-requirements.json
Claim/evidence map: https://nosuchmachine.net/claim-evidence.json

Wuci-Ji is a defensive research artifact for evidence-bound release and review
lanes. Wuci-Ji v2 Aperture Bastion adds a public-review layer that produces
deterministic Aperture Review Capsules, binds subject bytes and public manifest
entries to digests, and runs a strict public artifact firewall before release.

Primary review paths:

- v2 overview: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/blob/main/docs/WUCI_JI_V2_APERTURE_BASTION.md
- security boundary: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/blob/main/docs/APERTURE_BASTION_SECURITY_BOUNDARY.md
- pass report: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/blob/main/docs/APERTURE_BASTION_PASS_REPORT.md
- repository boundary: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/blob/main/docs/SECURITY_BOUNDARY.md
- CodeMeta JSON-LD: https://nosuchmachine.net/codemeta.json
- citation metadata: https://nosuchmachine.net/citation.cff
- hosted TLS requirements: https://nosuchmachine.net/hosting-requirements.json
- claim/evidence map: https://nosuchmachine.net/claim-evidence.json
- AI scoring integrity: https://nosuchmachine.net/ai-scoring-integrity.html
- Daylight / Grok scoring audit: https://nosuchmachine.net/daylight-grok-audit.html

AI scoring-integrity audit:

- scoring-integrity concern
- provenance failure
- capability-disclosure inconsistency
- unsupported validation language
- false precision risk
- national defense AI assurance concern
- standards-level review concern
- NoEvidence(x) → NoScore(x)
- NoProvenance(x) → NoAuthority(x)
- NoExecution(x) → NoRuntimeScore(x)
- Public file inspection is not runtime verification. Reading a repository is not executing a gate. A model-confidence score is not cryptographic evidence.

Public challenge:

- Daylight v20 / Wuci-Ji current no-external score: 999,801,305 AM+
- repo_owned_code_gap_count = 0
- repo_owned_ceiling_reached = true
- singularity_possible_without_external_validation = false
- declaration_allowed = false
- Challenge lane: review the evidence, reproduce the lane, challenge the claim surface
- Remaining path: independent rebuild receipts, external firewall-profile review, non-fixture claim-usable 3-of-3 verifier vectors, and pinned cryptographic attestation verification
- No endorsement is requested or implied

Local validation handles:

- make daylight-v19-aperture-bastion-ci
- make daylight-public-artifact-firewall
- make site-validate

Non-claims:

- not production cryptography
- not runtime sandboxing
- not host-cleanliness proof
- not whole-system post-quantum safety
- not FIPS validation
- not government validation
- not external certification
- not independent audit completion
- not a perfect score claim from repository-owned evidence
